business.name: Papá Lou Auto Spa
business.headline: We’ll tell you straight what your car needs—and make it look new again.
business.tagline: A transparent, hands-on St. Cloud detailing shop where Papa Lou treats every vehicle like a personal project, prioritizing honest assessments and visible transformations over upsells.
business.emotional_core: Confident trust and visible pride in a vehicle’s transformation

contact.address: 1316 Dakota Ave, St Cloud, FL 34769, USA

services.name: Interior Restoration
services.desc: Heavy interior cleaning that brings filthy seats and carpets back to life.

services.name: Paint Correction & Ceramic Coating
services.desc: Swirl and scratch correction with long-lasting ceramic protection.

services.name: Headlight Restoration
services.desc: Cloudy, yellowed headlights restored to clear for safer night driving.

services.name: Paint Decontamination
services.desc: Deep decon that strips bonded grime before correction and coating.

services.name: Full Auto Detailing
services.desc: Inside-and-out detail with an honest inspection and a fair, upfront price.

highlights: Inspects every vehicle before quoting to avoid unnecessary upsells
Specializes in heavy interior restoration and paint correction/ceramic coating
Bilingual, relationship-driven service built on straight talk
Relies on documented before/after results over polished marketing
Single-location St. Cloud shop with a perfect 5-star track record

photos.alt: That shine after a fresh detail!
Bringing interiors back to life, one seat at a time.
Ready for the road ahead with a pristine finish.
That shine after a fresh detail!

reviews.name: Triple A
reviews.text: Incredible work, extremely professional and very accommodating.  They went above and beyond my expectations. I strongly recommend them for any detailing service you may need. They detailed the inside seats of my mothers car that were beyond filthy.. see photos for beginning and end results.

reviews.name: Todd Dunn
reviews.text: I have been coming to Papa Lou’s for over a year now he does amazing work my car comes in looking old and when he is finished it looks new. He is an ho man he will tell you straight if you need something or if yiu don’t. He is fair with his pricing and will always want to look at your car before going you a direct quote for cost. Lou has worked on my car since it was brand new (2023). I would highly recommend Papa Lou

reviews.name: Lee Ortiz
reviews.text: Best car detailing in the St. Cloud area! Auto detailing, ceramic coating, headlight restoration, paint correction, paint decontamination. He does it all!  Very professional, super detailed, great service, affordable pricing. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: NELLY
reviews.text: Luis was amazing!! Did a wonderful job, honest and hardworking man! Communicates perfect and gives you the right price for what needs to be done. Es el mejor!!!

reviews.name: Skate Reflections
reviews.text: Papa Lou does excellent work and really nice to talk with… I will be bringing all my vehicles to his shop.
